'''''Star Wars Episode I What's What''''' is a small book by [[Daniel Wallace]] that describes several key objects, creatures, and places in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].

{{Book-stub}}

==Contents==
===Ships and Vehicles===
*[[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Trade Federation Battleship]]
*[[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|Republic Cruiser]]
*[[Multi-Troop Transport/Legends|Trade Federation Large Transport]] (MTT)
*[[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|Single Trooper Aerial Platform]] (STAP)
*[[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Trade Federation Battle Tank]] (AAT)
*[[Tribubble bongo/Legends|Gungan Sub]]
*[[J-type 327 Nubian royal starship/Legends|The Naboo Queen's Royal Starship]]
*[[N-1 starfighter/Legends|Naboo Starfighter]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker's Podracer/Legends|Anakin's Podracer]]
*[[Plug-F Mammoth Split-X engine/Legends|Sebulba's Podracer]]
*[[Scimitar/Legends|Sith Infiltrator]]
*[[FC-20 speeder bike/Legends|Sith Speeder]]
*[[Air taxi/Legends|Coruscant Air Taxi]]
*[[Seraph-class urban landspeeder|Flash Speeder]]
*[[V-19 landspeeder|Gian Speeder]]
*[[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|Trade Federation Landing Craft]]

===Droids===
*[[Battle droid/Legends|Battle droid]]
*[[Droideka/Legends|Destroyer Droid]]
*[[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Starfighter]]
*[[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol Droid]]
*[[Astromech droid/Legends|Astromech Droid]]
*[[DUM-series pit droid/Legends|Pit Droid]]
*[[DRK-1 Dark Eye probe droid/Legends|Sith Probe Droid]]

===Weapons and Equipment===
*[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]]
*[[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]]
*[[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Electropole/Legends|Electropole]]
*[[Gungan shield generator]]
*[[Cesta/Legends|Gungan Cesta]]
*[[Mechno-chair/Legends|Mechno-chair]]
*[[A99 aquata breather/Legends|Underwater Breathing Device]]
*[[Holoprojector/Legends|Jedi Holoprojector]]
*[[Jedi testing screen/Legends|Jedi testing screen]]

===Creatures===
*[[Kaadu/Legends|Kaadu]]
*[[Opee sea killer/Legends|Opee sea killer]]
*[[Sando aqua monster/Legends|Sando aqua monster]]
*[[Colo claw fish/Legends|Colo claw fish]]
*[[Eopie/Legends|Eopie]]
*[[Fambaa/Legends|Fambaa]]
*[[Falumpaset/Legends|Falumpaset]]
*[[Nuna/Legends|Nuna]]
*[[Peko-peko/Legends|Peko-peko]]
*[[Shaak/Legends|Shaak]]

===Places===

*[[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]]
*[[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Arena]]
*[[Wald's Parts|Watto's Junk Shop]]
*[[Slave Quarters Row/Legends|Slave Quarters]]
*[[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]

*[[Grand Convocation Chamber|Galactic Senate Chamber]]
